This package gives an high-level entry point to the KeY world.

  • Classes in org.key_project.util.collection used by org.key_project.slicing.graph
    Class
    Description
    DefaultEdge
    Directed graph edge for use in DirectedGraph that simply stores the source and target graph nodes.
    DirectedGraph
    Simple implementation of the Graph interface.
    Graph
    A graph object G(V,E) contains a set V of vertices and a set E of edges.
    GraphEdge
    Graph edge for use in a Graph.
  • Classes in org.key_project.util.collection used by org.key_project.util
    Class
    Description
    ImmutableArray
     
    ImmutableList
    List interface to be implemented by non-destructive lists
  • Classes in org.key_project.util.collection used by org.key_project.util.collection
    Class
    Description
    DefaultImmutableMap
    This class implements ImmMap<S,T> and provides a persistent Map.
    DefaultImmutableSet
    implementation of a persistent set using the SLListOf implementation with all its implications (means e.g.
    Graph
    A graph object G(V,E) contains a set V of vertices and a set E of edges.
    GraphEdge
    Graph edge for use in a Graph.
    ImmutableHeap
    Interface for heaps of objects of class T.
    ImmutableLeftistHeap
    This class implements the leftist heap, see "Functional Data Structures" by Chris Okasaki
    ImmutableList
    List interface to be implemented by non-destructive lists
    ImmutableMap
    This interface has to be implemented by a Class providing a persistent Map.
    ImmutableMapEntry
    This interface declares a tupel of two values.
    ImmutableSet
    interface implemented by non-destructive Sets.
    ImmutableSLList
    Simple implementation of a non-destructive (unmodifiable) list.
    NotUniqueException
    thrown if a duplicate is being added via addUnique()
